_documentation: Edit the 'projects' array below to manage every card on the Projects and Home pages. Nothing here is hardcoded in HTML. Fields: id (unique slug), name, url, category, icon (a lucide-react icon name, e.g. 'globe', 'search', 'code'), status ('live' | 'beta' | 'soon'), featured (bool — shows on Home + gets a spot in the marquee), title/description (replace the placeholders with real copy when ready), tags (array of short strings).

projects.name: Nexo Hub
projects.title: Nexo Hub — Your Digital Command Center
projects.description: A curated, searchable directory of 490+ essential websites across AI, gaming, dev tools, design, music, finance, and more.

projects.name: Next Boost
projects.title: Next Boost — Grow Your Social With Real Engagement
projects.description: Grow your social the smart way. Complete tasks for other creators, earn points, and spend them to get real followers, likes, views and Discord members.

projects.name: Nexo Sites
projects.title: NexoSites | Modern Web Development Agency
projects.description: Premium, fast, mobile-ready websites for businesses worldwide — starting from $55. You buy the domain, we handle everything else. No upfront payment.
